title: Inplace ALTER TABLE might fail with duplicate key error if concurrent insertions
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t2 (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
ALTER TABLE t2 ADD COLUMN age INT;
INSERT INTO t2 (id, name, age) VALUES (4, 'David', NULL), (5, 'Eve', 30);
SELECT * FROM t2 WHERE age IS NULL OR age > 25;
key_bug_features: Concurrent insertions during ALTER TABLE cause duplicate key error
